title: crotalaria lutescens
intro: Crotalaria lutescens, also known as the yellow rattle or yellow cup, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the management of respiratory issues, including bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria lutescens is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to enhance its therapeutic effects and provide relief from various health conditions.
